message:
Add /changelog trigger workflow and pr_number input

- New trigger workflow: responds to /changelog comments in PRs
- Added pr_number input to reusable workflow for flexibility
- Uses /changelog instead of @claude to avoid conflict with Claude App

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,11 @@ name: Add Changelog Entry
 
 on:
   workflow_call:
+    inputs:
+      pr_number:
+        description: PR number to add changelog entry to
+        required: false
+        type: number
     secrets:
       ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:
         description: Anthropic API key for Claude
@@ -21,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Checkout PR branch
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
-          ref: refs/pull/${{ github.event.issue.number }}/head
+          ref: refs/pull/${{ inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}/head
           fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Run Claude changelog agent
@@ -49,5 +54,5 @@ jobs:
             🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
 
             Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>"
-            git push origin HEAD:refs/pull/${{ github.event.issue.number }}/head
+            git push origin HEAD:refs/pull/${{ inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}/head
           fi

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+name: Claude Changelog Entry
+
+on:
+  issue_comment:
+    types: [created]
+  # Manual trigger for testing
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      pr_number:
+        description: PR number to add changelog entry to
+        required: true
+        type: number
+
+jobs:
+  add-changelog-entry:
+    # Trigger on /changelog command in PR comments
+    # Or via manual workflow_dispatch for testing
+    if: |
+      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
+      (github.event.issue.pull_request &&
+       contains(github.event.comment.body, '/changelog'))
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/changelog-add.yaml
+    with:
+      pr_number: ${{ github.event.inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}
+    secrets:
+      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
